ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the organization operates */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_listings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Educational qualifications required for the job */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the job */,
  "application_link" TEXT /* Link to the application process or job description */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job is based */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, intern) */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum years of experience required for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_qualification FOREIGN KEY ("qualification") REFERENCES qualifications ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification (e.g., 10th, ITI, Diploma, Degree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  "minimum_grade" TEXT /* Minimum grade or percentage required for the qualification */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area for the qualification (e.g., Computer Science, Marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job listing for which the application is submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL of the job seeker's resume */,
  "cover_letter_url" TEXT /* URL of the job seeker's cover letter */,
  "application_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed status of the application (e.g., reason for rejection, feedback) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_listings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employer, job seeker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_qualifications" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the qualification */,
  "year_completed" TEXT /* Year in which the qualification was completed */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the qualification was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category (e.g., IT, Healthcare, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_category_mapping" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id", "category_id")
)
